ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region for the size chart */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system used (e.g., EU, US, CN) */,
  "size_44" TEXT /* Size 44 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_46" TEXT /* Size 46 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_48" TEXT /* Size 48 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_50" TEXT /* Size 50 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_52" TEXT /* Size 52 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_54" TEXT /* Size 54 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_56" TEXT /* Size 56 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_58" TEXT /* Size 58 measurement for the country or region */,
  "size_60" TEXT /* Size 60 measurement for the country or region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_system FOREIGN KEY ("size_system") REFERENCES size_systems ("size_system")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence for the customer */,
  "bust_size" INTEGER /* Bust size of the customer */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Preferred size chart for the customer */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the customer */,
  "waist_size" INTEGER /* Waist size of the customer */,
  "hip_size" INTEGER /* Hip size of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_bust_size" INTEGER /* Recommended bust size for the customer */,
  "recommended_waist_size" INTEGER /* Recommended waist size for the customer */,
  "recommended_hip_size" INTEGER /* Recommended hip size for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used for the conversion */,
  "size" TEXT /* Original size to be converted */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region for the converted size */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system used (e.g., EU, US, CN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the event */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart used in the event */,
  "size" TEXT /* Original size involved in the event */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size involved in the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., size conversion, recommendation) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used (e.g., Chrome, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Name of the size system (e.g., EU, US, CN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_types" (
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size type */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Name of the size type (e.g., bust, waist, hip) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "customer_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size type */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_size_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_type_id") REFERENCES size_types ("size_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
